verbGlossary.MODELS WORK OF: {source} represents the geometry and scope installed by this {target}
verbGlossary.COORDINATES PLACEMENT OF: {source} spatially coordinates routing and placement across MEP {target}s
verbGlossary.SEQUENCES DEPLOYMENT OF: {source} links {target} mobilization to the construction schedule
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIES: {source} extracts {target} quantities for cost estimation and procurement
verbGlossary.MEASURES: {source} calculates area, length, or volume of materials from {target}
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES: {target} carries product specification data for {source} or assembly
verbGlossary.PARAMETERIZES: {source} properties store performance ratings, capacities, and technical specs for {target}
verbGlossary.DETECTS CONFLICT BETWEEN: {source} identifies spatial interference in {target} routing or placement
verbGlossary.DIRECTS FABRICATION OF: {source}-based shop drawings guide offsite fabrication of {target}-specific components
verbGlossary.DIRECTS INSTALLATION BY: {source}-based drawings guide field installation sequence for {target}
verbGlossary.CAPTURED USING: {source} data captured using survey instruments and laser scanners
verbGlossary.OPERATED BY: {source}capture flown and managed by survey personnel
verbGlossary.VERIFIED BY: {source}checked by QC inspector against installed field conditions
